name: codex-chatgpt-control
description: Control visible ChatGPT Chat and Work from Codex with verified configuration, GPT-5.6 Sol High consultation, files, artifacts, and safe blockers.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to visible ChatGPT Chat or Work with verified controls, GPT-5.6 Sol High review, files, and artifacts
interface.longDescription: ChatGPT Surface Control lets Codex agents work with the visible ChatGPT Chat and Work experiences. It supports surface detection, verified configuration, user-directed prompts, thread and Work-task continuation, progress polling, steering, file attachments, visible artifacts and downloads, response capture, redacted reports, and strict GPT-5.6 Sol High Intelligence consultation workflows for ChatGPT Plus. It does not bypass ChatGPT login, call hidden endpoints, read cookies, fall back to Pro for focused consultations, or replace the OpenAI API or official Codex SDK.
defaultPrompt: Use GPT-5.6 Sol at High Intelligence to critique this plan and capture the complete gated reply.
Start a visible Work task and report progress without duplicate submission.
Continue the ChatGPT thread open in Chrome.
